scripts.install:ai: cd ai-service && python -m venv .venv && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:ai
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "AI,BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run ai" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
